title:
We need your help - test a design option
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## We need your help - test a design option
Thanks to everyone who participated in the card sort to help influence the direction of data.govt.nz.
Two design options have been created based on your feedback, and now we need you to test the options to determine the final structure.

### Click an option to test
Please test any one of the following two options. This will take 10 minutes, and is confidential.
The results will be analysed to determine the final structure for data.govt.nz.
